title: "From Ideas to Opportunities" Assignment
description: Please answer the 5 multiple-choice questions. The questions evaluate your understanding of the topics discussed in the "From Ideas to Opportunities" lecture. Make sure to submit it before the due date.
descriptionText: Please answer the 5 multiple-choice questions. The questions evaluate your understanding of the topics discussed in the "From Ideas to Opportunities" lecture. Make sure to submit it before the due date.

questions.text: Which of the following is an example of the anchoring bias:

answers.text:
